testcase.name: A simple palindrome
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Example: A simple palindrome Given I have the string utilities ... passed in 0.000s When I reverse the string "racecar" ... passed in 0.001s Then the reversed string should be "racecar" ... passed in 0.000s And the string "racecar" should be a palindrome ... passed in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: A palindrome with mixed case and punctuation
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Example: A palindrome with mixed case and punctuation Given I have the string utilities ... passed in 0.000s When I reverse the string "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama" ... passed in 0.000s Then the string "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama" should be a palindrome ... passed in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: A non-palindrome
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin Example: A non-palindrome Given I have the string utilities ... passed in 0.000s When I reverse the string "behave" ... passed in 0.000s Then the reversed string should be "evaheb" ... passed in 0.000s But the string "behave" should not be a palindrome ... passed in 0.000s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Counting vowels in a word
Vowel counting across inputs -- @1.1
Vowel counting across inputs -- @1.2
Vowel counting across inputs -- @1.3
Vowel counting across inputs -- @1.4
Title case conversion
Slugify conversion
